title: Oak A3 3D Deep Box Picture Frame Display Memory Box with 1" White Mount For Medals Memorabilia Flowers etc
description: Material: Each frame is made using Composite Wood molding and fitted with quality backboard. All Frames comes with expensive Styrene Protective sheet (which have same clarity of glass) Molding: Width of the molding: 25mm Depth of the molding: 35mm Space between Front Glass and Backboard: 25mm Hanging / Standing: Our frames come hanging hooks and can be hung both portrait and landscape. Square Frames of 10x10 or smaller comes with both back stand and hooks, but frames larger than 10x10 comes with hooks only and can be used for hanging /wall mounting only. Rectangular Frames of 12x10 or smaller comes with both back stand and hooks, but frames larger than 12x10 comes with hooks only and can be used for hanging /wall mounting only. Important Information: Size you select is Frame Aperture Size, not the visible size or overall size of frame. Mount border covers display from all four sides. For example if you order 8x8 with 1" mount, then visible widow size will be 1" smaller from each side and the inside aperture of the mount and visible window will 6x6 There is protective plastic film on both side of the styrene sheet. Please remove it before framing your picture. Glass is not suitable to be sent by post. So All Frames are supplied with Styrene safety glass, which has same clarity as glass, but it is much expensive, durable and safer than traditional glass. Especially suitable for homes with kids and elderly. Picture shown are for illustration purpose only. If you have any question, please contact us.

specifications_table.Included components: ‎Styrene Protective Sheet, Hanging Hooks, Back Stand
